description: Terms excluded from string-match annotation — too generic for meaningful matching

stoplist.name: Library
stoplist.reason: Matches 'Carter Library' in source citations that leak into body text

stoplist.name: Civil
stoplist.reason: Generic adjective; compound terms like 'civil rights' match separately

stoplist.name: Letter
stoplist.reason: Matches 'letter of the law', 'letter of transmittal', etc.

stoplist.name: Loan
stoplist.reason: Generic noun in financial contexts; 'loan agreement' etc. match separately

stoplist.name: Arms
stoplist.reason: Generic noun; 'arms control', 'arms transfer' match as compound terms

stoplist.name: Data
stoplist.reason: Generic noun appearing in any analytical context

stoplist.name: Unit
stoplist.reason: Generic noun; 'unit prices', organizational units, etc.

stoplist.name: Access
stoplist.reason: Generic noun; 'access to ICRC', 'access to counsel', etc.

stoplist.name: Death
stoplist.reason: Generic noun; 'death by paralysis', 'sentenced to death', etc.

stoplist.name: Arrest
stoplist.reason: Generic noun; appears in human rights reporting contexts
